name: Community Radio Education Training (CRET)
focus_area: Community radio, sound art, technical audio skills, workshops and apprenticeships
funding_model: Charitable non-profit; training, workshops, and access programming supported by society operations and likely grants/donations
target_demographics: People with low income; economically or socially disadvantaged groups; community members seeking radio/audio skills
key_outcomes: Provides training, classes, workshops, and apprenticeships in radio skills, technical skills, sound art, and community development; expands access to radio/audio production for underserved groups

name: Media Arts Committee (MAC)
focus_area: Audio art, artist residencies, commissioned experimental audio work, media arts workshops
funding_model: Charitable non-profit media arts program; supported through organization resources and arts/community funding
target_demographics: Artists, audio creators, and community participants including disadvantaged groups via CRES access mandate
key_outcomes: Provides workshops and training in audio art; funds artist residencies and commissions experimental audio art pieces

name: Volunteer Training and Workshops
focus_area: Campus-community radio, journalism, podcasting, audio production, DJing, media organizing
funding_model: Non-profit, member-owned campus/community radio station supported by members, volunteers, and institutional/community funding
target_demographics: Montreal community members and students, especially people underserved by mainstream media
key_outcomes: Offers multi-level training for volunteers in DJing, production, podcasting, news, and radio research; builds technical, interviewing, coordinating, and promotion skills; serves as a training ground for community and student populations

name: Community News Collective Workshop
focus_area: Community journalism, local news production, collaborative radio reporting
funding_model: Embedded in non-profit campus/community radio operations
target_demographics: New and existing volunteers interested in local journalism; no prior experience required
key_outcomes: Develops critical thinking, radio research, and collaborative journalism skills; contributes to community news programming underrepresented in mainstream media

name: Podcasting 101 Workshop
focus_area: Podcast production and entry-level audio storytelling
funding_model: Station-based workshop within non-profit volunteer training ecosystem
target_demographics: Active volunteers, students, and community participants new to audio storytelling
key_outcomes: Introduces volunteers to podcasting fundamentals and supports pathways into station production and community storytelling

name: Production Workshops
focus_area: Audio recording and editing using digital audio workstations
funding_model: Non-profit station workshop offering through volunteer training
target_demographics: Active volunteers and community members developing radio production skills
key_outcomes: Teaches audio recording and editing skills; supports participant capacity to produce station content and independent projects

name: Digital Storytelling Facilitation and Mentorship Network
focus_area: Indigenous digital storytelling, facilitator development, mentorship, community-engaged storytelling
funding_model: University- and research-network-linked initiative tied to Canada Research Chairs and CIHR/NEIHR-related networks
target_demographics: Indigenous facilitators, researchers, communities, and participants interested in digital storytelling methods
key_outcomes: Supports people who want to become digital storytelling facilitators; connects storytelling practice to Indigenous well-being, mentorship, and research networks

name: Hands on Media Education digital storytelling workshops
focus_area: Digital storytelling, intergenerational Indigenous media education
key_outcomes: Led a week-long workshop bringing youth and Elders together to create digital stories; supports intergenerational storytelling and cultural knowledge sharing

name: Community digital storytelling practice
location: Canada (organization referenced nationally; exact location not confirmed from source snippet)
focus_area: Digital media, artistic collaboration, creative facilitation, community digital storytelling
key_outcomes: Uses digital media and artistic collaboration to engage marginalized youth in personally and socially transformative storytelling work

name: Community radio and sound art workshops
focus_area: Radio, technical training, sound art, community educational uses of audio
target_demographics: General community participants with emphasis on disadvantaged groups and low-income participants
key_outcomes: Provides facilities and instruction for community educational uses of radio and audio; emphasizes access, experimentation, and community development
